emails.subject: Re: Fuel
emails.body: We need to discuss further. My concern would be that how do we know what HPL should be retaining at a compressor or zone to make sure we recoup our fuel cost Also, could allocated fuel cause a contract imbalance? I think that Pipeline Operations can handle the scheduling of third party fuel retainage. But, if we retain fuel on ENA transports, then we need to come up with a plan to nominate this in Marketing Operations to Houston Pipeline. Currently, this process is not in place. Enron North America Corp. From: Brenda F Herod 06/22/2000 12:35 PM

emails.subject: Re: Fuel
emails.body: Per Mary, Sitara can not handle it either. It can calculate and withhold volume from the deal as a for fuel, but not as part of the price. Steve says this is a nightmare for the Denver office. Can you take the "To Do" to follow-up on this throughout the systems, and get back with Ed to further discuss? I'd really appreciate it. Michael Eiben 06/22/2000 01:09 PM
